back_translation: As for you, you used to be dead in your trespasses and sins

In these trespasses, you used to walk in life according to the way of this world, and according to the ruler of the authority of the air, that is, the spirit who is now working in the sons of disobedience
Among them, all of us also used to live in the lusts of our flesh in the past, doing the desires of the flesh and of the mind; and we, by nature, were children of the wrath of God like the others
But God, who is full of mercy, with His great love by which He loved us
He has made us, who were dead in our trespasses, alive together with Lord Christ — by grace you have received salvation
And He has raised us up together with Lord Christ, and has seated us together with Him in the heavenly realms in Lord Jesus Christ
So that in the ages that are to come, He may display the surpassing riches of His grace, which is shown in His kindness toward us in Lord Jesus Christ
Because by grace, you have received salvation through faith; and this salvation does not come from yourselves, but is a gift from God
Not from works, so that no one may boast
Because we are His workmanship, created in Lord Jesus Christ for good works, which God has prepared in advance, so that we may live in those good works

Therefore, remember that in the past you were Gentiles in the flesh, those who were called ‘the uncircumcised’ by those who were called ‘the circumcised,’ which is circumcision in the flesh by human hands
At that time, you were without Lord Christ, separated from the citizenship of Israel, and strangers to the covenants of the promise; without hope, and without God in the world
But now in Lord Jesus Christ, you who once were far away have been brought near by the blood of Lord Christ
Because He Himself is our peace; He has made the two parties one, and He has torn down the dividing wall — that is, the hostility — in His body
He has abolished the law of commandments and decrees, in order to create the two parties in Himself into one new man, making peace
And so that He might reconcile the two parties to God in one body through the cross — He killed the hostility by that cross
He came and proclaimed the gospel of peace to you who were far away, and peace to those who were near
Because through Him, we both parties have access to the Father by one Spirit
Therefore you are no longer strangers and foreigners; but you are fellow-citizens with the saints, and members in the household of God
You are built up upon the foundation of the apostles and the prophets, with Lord Jesus Christ Himself being the cornerstone
In Him, the whole building is fitted together and grows into a holy temple in Lord Jesus
In Him, you also are built up together to be a dwelling place for God by the Spirit
